title: Rich Syrian Mushroom Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful Syrian dish featuring winey, pillowy dumplings filled with mushrooms, perfect for a pescatarian-friendly dinner
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, and black pepper
Gradually add the olive oil and white wine, mixing until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
Flatten each ball into a disk and place a spoonful of mushroom and onion mixture in the center
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal
Bring the vegetable broth to a boil and gently add the dumplings
Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes or until the dumplings float to the surface
Serve the dumplings hot with additional vegetable broth spooned over the top
